sourcesContent:
export const NAV_LINKS = [
  { label: "Home", href: "#home" },
  { label: "Our Menu", href: "#menu" },
  { label: "Our Locations", href: "#locations" },
  { label: "Our Story", href: "#story" },
  { label: "Franchise", href: "#franchise" },
  { label: "Careers", href: "#careers" },
  { label: "Contact", href: "#contact" },
];

export const MARQUEE_ITEMS = ["DELIVERY", "PICK UP", "BRICK OVEN PIZZA", "PIZZA WITH LOVE"];

export const BEST_SELLING_PIZZAS = [
  { id: "sammy", name: "Sammy the Butcher",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/29885275/pexels-photo-29885275.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    description: "Pomodoro, speck, sausage, smoked ham, pepperoni" },
  { id: "johnny-vodka", name: "Johnny Vodka",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589187151053-5ec8818e661b?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2NzV8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxwZXBwZXJvbmklMjBwaXp6YSUyMHRvcCUyMHZpZXd8ZW58MHx8fHwxNzc2Njg2NzU4fDA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85",
    description: "Creamy vodka sauce, mozzarella, crispy pepperoni" },
  { id: "tony-supremo", name: "Tony Supremo",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/8471701/pexels-photo-8471701.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    description: "Pomodoro, capsicum, onion, ham, pepperoni, sausage, mushrooms, olives" },
  { id: "proscuitto-papi", name: "Proscuitto Papi",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/29885275/pexels-photo-29885275.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    description: "Fior di latte, prosciutto, rocket, shaved parmesan" },
];

export const REVIEWS = [
  { id: 1, title: "Best pizza in London", body: "Absolutely incredible pizza! The crust is perfectly thin and crispy. Will definitely be coming back.", author: "Leonard", daysAgo: "2 days ago", stars: 5 },
  { id: 2, title: "Absolutely amazing!", body: "Smarika is a really kind and helpful person, she deserves everything she wishes to do. I loved the service.", author: "Marco", daysAgo: "3 days ago", stars: 5 },
  { id: 3, title: "The best pizza of sydney", body: "Johnny Gio's consistently delivers the best brick oven pizza you can find in Sydney. Highly recommended.", author: "Sasha", daysAgo: "4 days ago", stars: 5 },
  { id: 4, title: "Fat girl is so happy", body: "This place knows how to do pizza right. Loaded with fresh ingredients and packed with flavour.", author: "Mahbub", daysAgo: "6 days ago", stars: 5 },
  { id: 5, title: "Cool", body: "Quick service, friendly staff and the pizza was delicious. Could not ask for more on a Friday night.", author: "Jean", daysAgo: "7 days ago", stars: 5 },
  { id: 6, title: "My new favourite", body: "I've tried every pizza joint in the area and this one takes the crown. Authentic and delicious.", author: "Amelia", daysAgo: "1 week ago", stars: 5 },
];

export const LOCATIONS = {
  "NEW SOUTH WALES": ["Balgowlah","Belmore","Bondi","Campbelltown","Caringbah","Carnes Hill","Chatswood","Coogee","Dee Why","Dulwich Hill","Eastgardens","Enmore","Five Dock","Gladesville","Kirrawee","Lane Cove","Mascot","Mona Vale","Neutral Bay","Potts Point","Ramsgate","Rozelle","Turramurra","Waterloo"],
  "QUEENSLAND": ["New Farm"],
  "ACT": ["Braddon"],
  "VIC": ["Balaclava"],
};

export const SCROLLING_LOCATIONS = ["Balaclava","Balgowlah","Belmore","Bondi","Braddon","Campbelltown","Caringbah","Carnes Hill","Chatswood","Coogee","Dee Why","Dulwich Hill","Eastgardens","Enmore","Five Dock","Gladesville","Kirrawee","Lane Cove","Mascot","Mona Vale","Neutral Bay","New Farm","Potts Point","Ramsgate"];
